# ChainStream — Multi-chain Web3 Data Service

> One API, one GraphQL endpoint, one WebSocket stream and one Kafka cluster
> for every token, trade, wallet, pool and compliance signal across 10+ chains
> (Solana, Ethereum, BSC, Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, zkSync, Sui…).

## Data products

- **Tokens** — metadata, prices, security signals, creation events
- **Trades** — normalized DEX swap events
- **Wallets** — balances, PnL, net-worth, transfer history
- **DEX Pools** — state, reserves, fees, TVL, liquidity snapshots
- **Rankings** — curated lists (hot / new / migrated / final-stretch)
- **Candles (OHLC)** — multi-interval aggregations
- **Holders** — top holders, distribution, concentration
- **Blockchain Core** — raw blocks, txs, gas
- **Smart Money** — curated high-alpha wallet cohorts
- **Compliance (KYT / KYA)** — risk scoring on transactions and addresses

## Access methods

| Surface   | When to use                                                |
|-----------|------------------------------------------------------------|
| REST      | Lookups and snapshots over plain HTTP (default)            |
| GraphQL   | Flexible, analytical queries JOIN-ing across products       |
| WebSocket | Low-latency live streams for UIs, bots, dashboards         |
| Kafka     | Server-to-server ingestion, guaranteed delivery, replay    |
| SDKs      | Typed wrappers for TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust            |
| CLI       | Shell-native access to all data and DeFi primitives        |

## MCP Server (for AI Agents)

Connect to ChainStream's MCP Server for AI-native data access:

- **URL**: `https://mcp.chainstream.io/mcp`
- **Transport**: Streamable HTTP (supports horizontal scaling, progress reporting)
- **Authentication**: Bearer Token (API Key) or x402 micropayment

### Tools (18 outcome-oriented tools)

Each tool orchestrates multiple API calls internally and returns curated results.

| Tool | Description | Risk |
|------|-------------|------|
| tokens/search | Search tokens by name, symbol, or address across all chains | L0 |
| tokens/analyze | Comprehensive token analysis: price, volume, holders, security, liquidity | L0 |
| tokens/price_history | OHLCV candlestick data for charting and technical analysis | L0 |
| tokens/discover | Find tokens by on-chain metrics (volume, price change, trades) | L0 |
| tokens/compare | Compare up to 5 tokens side by side | L0 |
| wallets/profile | Complete wallet profile: holdings, PnL, net worth in one call | L1 |
| wallets/activity | Recent wallet transfers and balance changes | L1 |
| market/trending | Trending tokens by category (hot, new, migrated, graduating, stocks) | L0 |
| dex/quote | Swap quote with expected output, price impact, fees (read-only) | L0 |
| dex/swap | Execute token swap on DEX (requires confirmation) | L3 |
| dex/create_token | Create token on launchpad (requires confirmation) | L3 |
| trading/backtest | Strategy backtesting with historical data | L2 |
| trading/execute | Execute trade (requires confirmation) | L3 |
| trades/recent | Recent on-chain trades for a token or wallet | L0 |
| kyt/assess_risk | KYT risk assessment for an address | L1 |
| webhooks/manage | Manage webhook endpoints (list, create, delete) | L1 |
| blockchain/info | Supported chains and DEX protocols | L0 |
| transaction/send | Broadcast signed transaction (requires confirmation) | L3 |

### Resources

- `chainstream://chains` — Supported chains and status
- `chainstream://chains/{chain}/dexes` — DEX protocols per chain
- `chainstream://docs/api_reference` — Full API reference (all /v2/* endpoints)
- `chainstream://docs/query_examples` — Common query patterns for agents

## Supported Chains

Solana, BSC, Base, Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Optimism, and more.

## Authentication

1. **API Key**: Traditional Bearer token authentication
2. **x402 Micropayment**: Agent pays per query via USDC on Base/Solana, no registration needed
3. **CLI Wallet**: `npx @chainstream-io/cli login` creates a TEE-backed wallet for DeFi + x402

## CLI (`@chainstream-io/cli`)

Command-line tool for data queries and DeFi execution:

```bash
npx @chainstream-io/cli login                                    # Create wallet
npx @chainstream-io/cli token search --keyword PUMP --chain sol   # Search tokens
npx @chainstream-io/cli token security --chain sol --address ADDR # Security check
npx @chainstream-io/cli market trending --chain sol --duration 1h # Trending tokens
npx @chainstream-io/cli wallet pnl --chain sol --address ADDR    # Wallet PnL
npx @chainstream-io/cli dex swap --chain sol ...                  # Execute swap
```

CLI auto-purchases subscriptions via x402 when encountering 402 and saves the API Key.

## Agent Skills

Structured AI capability packages (SKILL.md) for coding assistants:

- **chainstream-data**: Read-only data queries (token analytics, market trends, wallet profiling)
- **chainstream-defi**: DeFi execution (swap, bridge, launchpad) with mandatory user confirmation

Install: Cursor (auto-discovered), Claude Code (`/plugin install chainstream`), Codex/OpenCode (clone + symlink), Gemini CLI (`gemini extensions install`).

## Quick Start

### Claude Desktop
Add to `claude_desktop_config.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "chainstream": {
      "url": "https://mcp.chainstream.io/mcp",
      "transport": "streamable-http"
    }
  }
}
```

### Cursor IDE
Add to `.cursor/mcp.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "chainstream": {
      "url": "https://mcp.chainstream.io/mcp",
      "transport": "streamable-http"
    }
  }
}
```

### Google ADK
```python
from chainstream_adk import ChainStreamToolset
agent = Agent(model="gemini-2.0-flash", tools=[ChainStreamToolset()])
```

### Coinbase AgentKit
```typescript
import { createChainStreamActions } from '@chainstream/agentkit-action';
const agent = new CdpAgent({ actions: [...defaultActions, ...createChainStreamActions(config)] });
```

## Pricing

| Endpoint | Price |
|----------|-------|
| tokens/search | $0.001 |
| tokens/analyze | $0.003 |
| tokens/price_history | $0.002 |
| tokens/discover | $0.002 |
| tokens/compare | $0.005 |
| wallets/profile | $0.005 |
| wallets/activity | $0.002 |
| market/trending | $0.001 |
| dex/quote | $0.001 |
| kyt/assess_risk | $0.01 |
| trading/backtest | $0.05 |
